title: eriogonum cedrorum
intro: Eriogonum cedrorum, also known as the cedar buckwheat, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eriogonum cedrorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
